_doc: Voice registry for step4_tts.py — maps character SLOTS to TTS voices across providers. RESOLVE ORDER per (language, slot): language_overrides[language][slot] if present, else slots[slot]; the provider's entry in `providers` supplies the default model + settings (a slot may override model/settings inline). SLOTS: miss_nova (the AI teacher Miss Nova — ONE consistent warm brand voice everywhere), female_lead, male_lead, female_secondary, male_secondary, narrator. A character maps to a slot at runtime: Miss Nova -> miss_nova; a narrator/voiceover line -> narrator; otherwise inferred gender + first-of-that-gender -> *_lead, the rest -> *_secondary. FILL voice_id from each provider's library: `python3.13 facebook/scripts/step4_tts.py --list-voices --provider elevenlabs` (or cartesia). ElevenLabs multilingual voices carry across languages (set once in `slots`); Cartesia voices are usually language-specific (set per language under `language_overrides`). A voice_id still beginning with 'TODO' makes live synth fail loudly for that slot/language.

miss_nova._note: Miss Nova — warm, patient, encouraging young woman; the brand AI teacher, identical voice across every language
